Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the next reviewer response (SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time until Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 since the manuscript passed Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 Cycle Time within the reviewer selection phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Unavailable compared to the average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer No Response compared to the average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to the Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 compared to the minimum time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the end of the case

Name: Time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the Assign a Different Editor activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is now due in variants with high overall performance time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'
